calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Continued To Oct-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Newman for (executor) Rosemary Phelps.

The Court asked if the 6th amended petition has been filed. Mr. Newman stated that it had not, that he is confused as to what the examiner wants and that he has not spoken to the examiner to clarify. The Court stated that there is an issue with the change in shares in Boeing and Edison, that this needs to be explained in the 6th amended account and that waivers need to be filed if necessary. The accounting petition was continued to October 26, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Chien. (Not Reported)
